title: Expand message token box when creating automation notifications
excerpt: It is super frustrating that the delivered box to create automation notification messaging does not expand, it is way to small, driving a longer time to complete to what should be an easy, pain-free process.

posts.author: mzona (Marisa Zona)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is super frustrating that the delivered box to create automation notification messaging does not expand, it is way to small, driving a longer time to complete to what should be an easy, pain-free process.
